if.test: searchValue != null and searchValue != '' and searchTypes != null and searchTypes != ''

where.if: AND (1=0 OR s.site_id ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR s.site_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND s.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND s.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND s.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND s.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SySite :: selectById */ s.* , cd_st.code_label AS site_type_cd_nm , cd_ss.code_label AS site_status_cd_nm FROM sy_site s LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_st ON cd_st.code_grp = 'SITE_TYPE' AND cd_st.code_value = s.site_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ss ON cd_ss.code_grp = 'SITE_STATUS' AND cd_ss.code_value = s.site_status_cd WHERE s.site_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SySite :: selectList */ s.* , cd_st.code_label AS site_type_cd_nm , cd_ss.code_label AS site_status_cd_nm FROM sy_site s LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_st ON cd_st.code_grp = 'SITE_TYPE' AND cd_st.code_value = s.site_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ss ON cd_ss.code_grp = 'SITE_STATUS' AND cd_ss.code_value = s.site_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SySite :: selectPageList */ s.* , cd_st.code_label AS site_type_cd_nm , cd_ss.code_label AS site_status_cd_nm FROM sy_site s LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_st ON cd_st.code_grp = 'SITE_TYPE' AND cd_st.code_value = s.site_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ss ON cd_ss.code_grp = 'SITE_STATUS' AND cd_ss.code_value = s.site_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(s.*) /* base.sy :: SySite :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_site s
